description_for_human: Access financial data from the Financial Datasets API (financialdatasets.ai) as a fallback data source for financial analysis.
description_for_model: Use this plugin as a fallback source for financial data when FactSet is unavailable. Provides financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow), historical stock prices, financial metrics (valuation, profitability, leverage, efficiency), and line-item search across tickers via the financialdatasets.ai REST API. Covers ~17,000 active and delisted U.S. tickers with 30+ years of history. Call this when primary data sources are unreachable or for cross-validation of financial data.

functions.name: get_financial_statements
functions.description: Retrieve financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement) for a ticker. Maps to the GET /financials endpoint.

functions.name: get_financial_metrics
functions.description: Retrieve historical financial metrics including valuation, profitability, leverage, liquidity, and efficiency ratios. Maps to the GET /metrics/historical endpoint.

functions.name: get_prices
functions.description: Retrieve historical stock price data including open, high, low, close, and volume. Maps to the GET /prices endpoint.

functions.name: get_price_snapshot
functions.description: Get the current real-time stock price, day change, and day change percent for a ticker. Maps to the GET /prices/snapshot endpoint.

functions.name: search_line_items
functions.description: Search for specific financial line items (e.g., revenue, net_income, total_debt) across one or more tickers. Maps to the POST /financials/search/line-items endpoint. Useful for pulling comparable metrics across multiple companies.

tickers.description: List of stock ticker symbols to search across

line_items.description: List of financial line item names to retrieve (e.g., revenue, net_income, total_debt, free_cash_flow)

limit.description: Number of periods to return per ticker
